title: The gist of the story.
framedQuote: monday has always been the place where people come together to get work done and achieve their business outcomes. Now — they do it side-by-side with agents that multiply their output.

boxes.title: True collaboration between people & agents
boxes.body: We now enable true collaboration between people and agents — a mutual workspace, group chat where people and agents talk side by side, and agents that join your meetings.

boxes.title: Connected to your AI ecosystem
boxes.body: We connect to the AI ecosystem you already use — bring your own agents to monday, or use monday from any AI tool via MCP and open APIs.

center.title: Humans + Agents
center.tagline: The team at the heart of the work.

nodes.title: Agents
nodes.summary: Smarter, more capable agents at the core.
nodes.detail: Agents understand who you are, your team, and where work stands. They produce real artifacts — not just chat replies — and orchestrate other agents when needed.

nodes.title: Communication
nodes.summary: Conversations where people and agents talk side by side.
nodes.detail: Group chat brings humans and agents into the same thread, with full shared context. Tag and mention agents like teammates.

nodes.title: Mutual workspace
nodes.summary: Shared spaces dedicated to a goal.
nodes.detail: Containers and initiatives — a single home for everyone working on the same outcome, with the context, history, and artifacts all in one place.

nodes.title: Workflows
nodes.summary: Agents embedded in the workflows you already run.
nodes.detail: Inputs, outputs, and behavior — end to end. People stay in control of exactly what each agent is doing inside the workflows your teams already trust.

nodes.title: Governance
nodes.summary: Visibility, permissions, and guardrails so adoption is safe.
nodes.detail: Control what agents can access at the user and team level. Surface the value they deliver. Boundaries that hold — so teams adopt with confidence.
